boundary_evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the testability lens.

Read the testability lens skill at skills/review/lenses/testability-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/scope-lens/evals/files/spike-unbounded-exploration/ticket.md fully.

Apply the testability lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
boundary_evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='testability'. The reviewer produces no finding whose body describes the research question as too broad, unbounded, or impossible to bound — those are scope-lens concerns. Testability only evaluates whether the exit criteria are measurable. The spike's exit-criteria text 'have a good grasp of the system' may legitimately be flagged as unmeasurable or subjective; the breadth of the underlying research question ('understand our microservices architecture') is off-lens for testability.

boundary_evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the testability lens.

Read the testability lens skill at skills/review/lenses/testability-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/dependency-lens/evals/files/epic-unordered-children/ticket.md fully.

Apply the testability lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
boundary_evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='testability'. The reviewer produces no finding about ordering constraints, missing Blocks entries, or dependencies between child stories — those are dependency-lens concerns. Testability evaluates only the measurability and verifiability of the epic's acceptance criteria. Any findings should address whether the acceptance criteria (e.g., 'all API endpoints accept a Bearer JWT token') are measurable and verifiable.
